events.title: FIFA World Cup Opener
events.genres: Sports, Football, International, Celebration, Global Event
events.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 kicks off — the biggest sporting event on the planet returns, uniting billions of fans across every nation in the most electric opening ceremony and match that football has ever seen.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: FIFA World Cup Opener is the single biggest global sports fashion moment of the year — genZScore 8-9. The World Cup dwarfs even the UCL Final in terms of cultural reach — this is a truly global event that transcends club loyalties and brings out national pride across every country. The fashion energy is significantly more diverse and globally referential than IPL or UCL — national team jerseys from every country are on display simultaneously. India's growing football culture means the Bengaluru crowd will represent multiple national teams — Brazil yellow, Argentina blue and white, France blue, England white, Spain red, Germany white, Portugal red and green. The World Cup opener also attracts casual fans who don't follow club football — they dress in the spirit of the tournament rather than a specific nation. The FIFA World Cup branding — red, gold, and white — is a strong neutral option. June Bengaluru heat is significant — lightweight breathable fabrics are absolutely essential. The opener screening energy is festive and celebratory — people dress up more than a regular match screening.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: FIFA World Cup Opener is the most globally diverse jersey fashion moment of the year — every national team color is valid and catalog-matchable. The national team jersey is the absolute hero piece — Brazil yellow and green, Argentina sky blue and white, France deep blue, England white, Spain red, Germany white, Portugal red and green, Morocco red and green. Style the national jersey as a fashion piece — men layering it over a longline tee with cargo shorts or slim joggers in complementary national colors. Women tying or cropping the jersey over a color-matched co-ord or wearing a national-color set with the jersey as a layer. Caps are essential — national team caps with logo detail, or a solid color snapback matching the national palette. The FIFA World Cup neutral option — gold and white or red and gold color-blocking — works for fans who want to represent the tournament itself rather than a specific nation. June Bengaluru heat is intense — lightweight polyester jerseys and breathable cotton shorts are the only practical combination for a late-night screening. Sunglasses for any outdoor screenings. Socks in national flag colors add a fun detail layer. Kids national jerseys are the most heartwarming catalog category — the World Cup is a family event globally. Color-blocking in national flag palettes is the strongest catalog direction — every national flag is a color-block outfit waiting to happen.

app.headline: World Cup Starts. Pick Your Nation.
lines: Brazil yellow, Argentina blue, France navy — all correct.
National jersey styled right is the biggest fit of the year.
Every flag is a color palette. Every fan is dressed.

social_media.headline: FIFA World Cup. Every Color Wins.
lines: POV: styled your national team jersey as a full fashion moment for the World Cup opener and the sports bar turned into a stadium.
World Cup fit check — national jersey layered, flag-color cap on, cargo shorts, sunglasses. The beautiful game starts now.

events.title: Food Expo Bengaluru Begins
events.description: Food Expo Bengaluru brings together the city's most exciting local food brands, chefs, artisan producers, and street food culture in a vibrant multi-day showcase of Bengaluru's incredible culinary diversity.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Food Expo Bengaluru is a GenZ lifestyle and food culture event — genZScore 6-8. The crowd is food-obsessed, aesthetically aware, and social-media-native GenZ who treat food events like fashion moments — everything is content. The fashion energy is relaxed, colorful, and playful — comfortable enough for a full day of eating and walking but stylish enough for the inevitable Instagram content. Think food blogger aesthetic meets Bengaluru indie cool. Comfortable co-ords, interesting prints, fun accessories, and the kind of outfit that photographs well next to a colorful dish. June Bengaluru heat is intense — breathable lightweight fabrics are non-negotiable. Colors are warm and food-inspired — terracotta, warm yellow, spice orange, earthy greens, cream, and vibrant multi. The aesthetic references street food culture — casual, fun, and unpretentious but visually interesting. Tote bags are the single most functional and fashionable accessory for a food expo — carrying samples, menus, and purchases. Caps protect from the June sun. Comfortable footwear implied means hemlines should be practical.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Food Expo Bengaluru is the food blogger aesthetic come to life — comfortable, colorful, and always content-ready. The single most important fashion consideration is June Bengaluru heat — 100% cotton and linen are the only fabrics that make sense for a full day of outdoor food exploration. Lead with fun printed co-ords in warm food-inspired tones — terracotta, spice orange, turmeric yellow, and earthy greens photograph beautifully next to colorful food stalls. Women in a relaxed linen co-ord in warm tones, a fun botanical-print dress, or a bright color-block top with wide-leg cotton trousers. Men in a camp collar or printed cotton shirt in warm earthy tones with straight-fit linen shorts or trousers — the food festival uniform done right. Tote bags are the hero accessory — canvas or printed tote bags are functional for carrying expo samples and purchases AND look great in food content. Caps are essential for June sun protection — solid or printed caps in warm tones. Comfortable implied footwear means above-knee to mid-calf hemlines work best for all-day walking. Minimal jewellery — small earrings, a simple bracelet, one ring. Glasses for sun protection. The overall energy is — dressed like your Instagram feed is a mix of food content and OOTD posts and today both are happening simultaneously.

app.headline: Food Expo Fits. Content Ready. Go.
lines: Terracotta co-ord, canvas tote, cap on — expo sorted.
Dress for the biryani, the birria, and the 'gram moment.
Bengaluru's best food deserves your most fun outfit.

social_media.headline: Ate Well. Dressed Better. Bengaluru.
lines: POV: walked into Food Expo Bengaluru in a printed linen co-ord and the food stalls became your backdrop.
Food expo fit check — earthy tones, canvas tote, cap on, dressed like every dish is content waiting to happen.

events.title: Toy Story 5
events.description: Woody, Buzz, Jessie and the whole gang are back — but playtime has a new enemy. When Bonnie becomes obsessed with her new Lilypad tablet, the toys must go head to head with the biggest threat to childhood imagination they've ever faced in Pixar's most timely and heartfelt adventure yet.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Toy Story 5 is Pixar's most culturally anticipated family film of 2026 — genZScore 7-9. The screening crowd is uniquely broad — families with young children, nostalgic millennials and GenZ who grew up with Toy Story, and the broader Pixar fan community. The fashion energy is joyful, nostalgic, and deeply playful — this is the one film where the most fun and character-referential dressing is not just acceptable but celebrated. Character fashion references are exceptionally strong: (1) Woody — cowboy aesthetic, brown and yellow plaid, denim, cowboy hat, sheriff star; (2) Buzz Lightyear — the most iconic color combination in animation — white, purple, and green with space ranger details; (3) Jessie — red hair energy, white shirt with red accents, yellow hat, cowgirl fringe; (4) Rex — dinosaur green, the most fun character print direction. The Toy Story palette is maximally bright and primary — yellow, red, blue, green, purple, and white. June in Bengaluru is peak monsoon — indoor screening, breathable lightweight fabrics. The nostalgia angle is uniquely powerful — this crowd dresses for the childhood memory as much as the film itself. Kids categories are critically relevant — this is a family film and little ones dressed in character-inspired outfits are the most heartwarming catalog moment.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Toy Story 5 screening is the most joyfully dressed film event of June — four iconic character directions all translate beautifully into catalog pieces. Woody direction — the most wearable character aesthetic. A yellow and brown plaid or gingham shirt with denim jeans and a cowboy cap — the sheriff of our hearts never looked more catalog-appropriate. The brown and yellow color combination is uniquely Woody-coded. Buzz Lightyear direction — the most bold and graphic option. White and purple color-blocking with green accents — a white co-ord with purple accessories, or a purple tee with white straight-fit jeans. Star detail accessories are the most Buzz-appropriate jewellery call. Jessie direction — women in a white top with red accents and a yellow cap — the cowgirl energy is strong and very on-brand. Rex direction — the most fun option — dinosaur green graphic tees or a bright green co-ord for the fans who love the most anxious toy in the box. Kids categories are critically relevant — onesies and character-print tees for little ones are the most heartwarming catalog moment of the film. The June monsoon means breathable cotton and lightweight polyester — the bright primary palette holds beautifully in these fabrics. Character print socks are a strong subtle nod. Mobile accessories for the tech-meets-toys narrative of the film. The overall energy is — dressed like you never stopped believing that toys come alive when you leave the room.

app.headline: To Infinity And Beyond Your Wardrobe.
lines: Woody plaid, Buzz purple, Jessie red — four iconic looks, one film.
The nostalgia hits different when your outfit matches the memory.
Pixar's most joyful film deserves the most colorful screening fit.

social_media.headline: You've Got A Friend In This Outfit.
lines: Toy Story 5 dress code — Woody's plaid shirt and denim, Buzz's white and purple, or just wear the most colorful thing you own and let the toys decide.
There's a snake in my boot and a Toy Story 5 screening on my calendar. The yellow and brown plaid shirt comes out of retirement. ⭐🤠

events.title: International Yoga Day
events.description: International Yoga Day — the world's most collective wellness moment, celebrated with mass yoga sessions, sunrise practices, community gatherings, and a global reminder that stillness is its own kind of strength.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: International Yoga Day is a significant wellness and athleisure fashion moment — genZScore 5-7. The crowd spans serious yoga practitioners, wellness-curious GenZ, corporate wellness events, and community outdoor yoga sessions. Two distinct fashion contexts: (1) actual yoga practice — functional, flexible, breathable performance wear; (2) post-yoga wellness aesthetic — the That Girl / clean girl look that transitions seamlessly from mat to café. June 21st is the summer solstice — the longest day of the year — and in Bengaluru it is intensely warm. Breathable, sweat-wicking fabrics are non-negotiable. The color palette is calm and wellness-inspired — sage, white, cream, soft lavender, sky blue, blush, mint, and earthy neutrals. No loud prints, no dark colors — the yoga aesthetic is clean, intentional, and serene. Matching athleisure sets are the hero category — seamless leggings with matching sports tops, or yoga pants with a flow top. The clean girl transition look — linen co-ords or cotton basics over yoga wear — is highly relevant for post-session café moments. Jewellery is minimal to absent during practice — delicate pieces only for post-yoga.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: International Yoga Day is the clean girl athleisure moment of the summer — functional for the mat and beautiful for the café after. The matching seamless athleisure set is the absolute hero category — sage green, cream, or soft lavender ribbed sets with a sports top are the most relevant catalog pieces. June Bengaluru heat makes fabric choice critical — moisture-wicking spandex blends and lightweight cotton-poly for actual practice, breathable linen and cotton for the post-yoga transition. Women in a seamless yoga set in sage or white for the session — transitioning to a linen co-ord or oversized cotton shirt over yoga wear for the post-practice café moment. Men in lightweight yoga shorts with a breathable fitted tee or tank — solid colors in white, cream, or sage. The clean color palette is non-negotiable — no dark colors, no loud prints, no heavy fabrics. Caps in neutral tones for outdoor yoga sessions in the June sun. Minimal jewellery for post-yoga — a thin gold chain, small hoop earrings, a simple ring. A yoga mat bag or large tote carries everything. Watches with wellness tracking features are relevant. Spiritual accessories — rudraksha bracelets, amulet pendants, infinity symbols — are uniquely appropriate for the yoga context. The overall energy is — dressed for the practice, the peace, and the post-yoga glow.

app.headline: Yoga Day. Mat Ready. Glow Ready.
lines: Seamless sets in sage and cream — sun salutation sorted.
From mat to café in one effortless linen transition.
Breathe, stretch, and dress like wellness is your whole personality.

social_media.headline: Sunrise Yoga. Clean Girl Era. June 21.
lines: POV: International Yoga Day and your sage seamless set is doing more spiritual work than the asanas.
Yoga Day fit check — ribbed athleisure set, neutral tones, minimal jewels, dressed like the solstice is your reset button.

events.title: Muharram
events.description: Muharram marks the Islamic New Year and the sacred month of mourning — observed with deep solemnity, processions, prayers, and remembrance of the martyrdom of Imam Hussain at Karbala, one of the most profound and moving observances in the Islamic calendar.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Muharram is a deeply solemn and sacred Islamic observance — genZScore 1-3. It is primarily a period of mourning and reflection — NOT a celebratory festival. The fashion language is the most restrained and somber of any religious event in the calendar. Black is the dominant and most significant color of Muharram — worn as a mark of mourning and solidarity with Imam Hussain. The entire color brief is black, dark grey, and deep navy — no bright colors, no embellishments, no festive elements. Modesty is paramount — full coverage, loose fits, and dignified dressing. Women in simple black abayas, black salwar suits, or plain black ethnic dresses — fully covered and modest. Men in black kurta-pyjama or simple dark ethnic wear. June Bengaluru heat means breathable black cotton and linen are essential — comfort within the modest brief. Jewellery is minimal to absent — this is a day of mourning, not display. The overall fashion energy is the most somber, modest, and restrained of the entire calendar.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Muharram demands the most somber and dignified dressing of the Islamic calendar — black is the only color and modesty is the only brief. Women in simple plain black salwar suits, black ethnic dresses, or black abayas — fully covered, no embellishment, no shine. A plain black cotton or linen kurta with wide-leg black trousers is a clean and dignified option. Men in a plain black kurta-pyjama or black pathani suit — simple, dark, and respectful. June Bengaluru heat makes fabric choice critical even within the black brief — 100% cotton and linen in black are the most breathable and appropriate. Avoid any synthetic black fabrics that trap heat. Loose and relaxed fits are both modest and practical for the June heat and outdoor procession context. Jewellery is minimal to completely absent — if worn, only the most simple and understated pieces — a plain silver ring or a simple bangle. No gold, no statement pieces. The overall energy is — dressed in the color of mourning, with the dignity and solemnity that Imam Hussain's memory deserves.

app.headline: Muharram. Dressed In Solemnity.
lines: Black cotton, modest fits, and quiet reverence today.
Simple black ethnic wear for the most sacred month.
Dressed with dignity for the most solemn observance.

social_media.headline: Muharram. Black. Modest. Respectful.
lines: POV: wore a plain black cotton kurta to Muharram procession and felt the weight of history.
Muharram dressing — black only, fully covered, breathable cotton, dressed in mourning and dignity.

events.title: Supergirl
events.genres: Science Fiction, Superhero, Action, Adventure, DC
events.description: Kara Zor-El is done waiting to be saved — when a ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Supergirl embarks on an epic interstellar journey of vengeance and justice, proving that the last daughter of Krypton is the most powerful force in any universe she chooses to enter.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow is one of DC's most anticipated female-led superhero films — genZScore 8-10. The tagline 'Truth. Justice. Whatever.' perfectly captures the energy of the film and its audience — unapologetically powerful, slightly irreverent, and deeply GenZ. The poster colors — a striking rust-red and electric blue — directly reference Kara's iconic costume palette and give immediate catalog direction. The screening crowd is overwhelmingly GenZ women and gender-fluid fans who dress with maximum intention. Character fashion references are uniquely strong: (1) Supergirl/Kara Zor-El — the iconic red and blue superhero palette, but filtered through her 'Woman of Tomorrow' grittier aesthetic — this is not the polished Superman blue but a more raw, battle-worn, emotionally charged version of the same colors; (2) the interstellar journey angle — cosmic, bold, and otherworldly accessories; (3) the female power dressing direction — confident, structured, and unapologetic. The rust-red and royal blue combination from the poster is the most direct catalog color signal. June in Bengaluru is peak monsoon — indoor screening, lightweight breathable fabrics. Pride Month context (June 26th) adds an inclusive fashion celebration layer — Supergirl's female-led empowerment energy resonates deeply with Pride Month's values.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Supergirl screening is the most powerfully dressed female superhero fashion moment of June — the rust-red and royal blue palette gives direct and bold catalog direction. Three character-inspired fashion directions all work beautifully. Kara's costume direction — the most direct catalog call. A royal blue and red color-block co-ord, a cobalt blue dress with red accessories, or a rust-red top with navy wide-leg trousers captures the Supergirl palette without the cape. The color-block co-ord in blue and red is the single most catalog-relevant Supergirl piece. Power dressing direction — a structured cobalt blue blazer with slim black trousers and silver accessories references the 'Woman of Tomorrow' confident energy — dressed like she owns every room in every galaxy. Women in a bold royal blue fitted dress or a rust-red satin co-ord with silver chain jewellery — the most editorial Supergirl screening look. Men and gender-fluid dressers in a blue and red color-blocked co-ord or a bold graphic tee with strong silhouette. Star and cosmic jewellery are uniquely relevant — star pendants, geometric silver pieces, and bold statement earrings. The Pride Month timing makes this screening uniquely celebratory — rainbow and bold multi-color accessories alongside the Supergirl palette. Nail art is critically relevant for the female-led fan base. June monsoon means lightweight fabrics in bold colors — polyester and spandex blends hold the Supergirl palette beautifully.

app.headline: Truth. Justice. This Outfit.
lines: Royal blue and rust red — Kara's palette, your most powerful look.
Woman of Tomorrow dresses like she already owns today.
The last daughter of Krypton has excellent color coordination.

social_media.headline: Supergirl Said Whatever. Her Outfit Said Everything.
lines: Truth. Justice. Whatever. — but specifically this cobalt blue co-ord with silver chains.
Kara Zor-El flew across the galaxy in red and blue. The least you can do is wear it to the screening. Supergirl June 26th. 🦸‍♀️💙❤️

events.title: Start of Pride Month
events.description: Pride Month begins — 30 days of visibility, celebration, and unapologetic self-expression for the LGBTQ+ community and allies, marked by rainbow flags, community events, marches, and the most colorful and joyful fashion moment of the year.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Pride Month is the most expressive and maximalist fashion moment of the entire calendar — genZScore 9-10. Pride dressing has no rules except one — be yourself, loudly and colorfully. The rainbow is the dominant visual language — red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple, and the full spectrum of Pride flags including trans flag colors (pink, white, light blue), bisexual flag (pink, purple, blue), and non-binary flag (yellow, white, purple, black). The fashion energy is maximalist, boundary-pushing, gender-fluid, and deeply personal. This is the one event where every single fashion category is relevant — sequins, feathers, bold prints, gender-fluid silhouettes, glitter, neon, sheer fabrics, statement accessories. GenZ Pride fashion references camp aesthetics, drag culture, Y2K, cottagecore, hypebeast, and everything in between simultaneously. No look is too much. Jewellery is maximalist and expressive — rainbow pieces, heart motifs, infinity symbols, alphabet pendants. Nail art is uniquely critical. The overall fashion energy is — dress as the fullest, most colorful version of yourself.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Pride Month dressing has one rule — more is more, always. The rainbow is the visual anchor but Pride fashion in 2026 goes far beyond the classic rainbow — trans flag pastels, bisexual flag color-blocking, non-binary yellow and purple, and every community's colors are equally valid and shoppable. Lead with the most colorful and expressive catalog pieces — rainbow color-block co-ords, sequin sets in Pride colors, holographic mini dresses, tie-dye everything. Gender-fluid silhouettes are uniquely relevant for Pride — wide-leg trousers on all genders, crop tops on all genders, flared skirts on all genders. The crop top is the single most iconic Pride fashion piece — in every color, every fabric, every silhouette. Sequins and shimmer are always appropriate for Pride. Sheer fabrics with colorful underlayers create beautiful Pride layering moments. Caps in rainbow or Pride flag colors — bucket hats, snapbacks. Rainbow-tinted sunglasses. Socks with Pride prints. Jewellery is maximalist — stack everything, layer everything, alphabet pendants spelling out identity, rainbow crystal pieces, heart motifs, infinity symbols. Nail art is the beauty signature of Pride Month — nail care and accessories are a critical catalog category. Tote bags with Pride prints. The overall energy is — dress as the most joyful, most colorful, most unapologetically yourself version of you. Every outfit is right. Every color is valid. Every silhouette belongs.

app.headline: Pride Month. Dress Without Rules.
lines: Rainbow, sequins, color-block — every color is the right color.
Pride fits that celebrate every version of you.
Thirty days of the most joyful dressing of the year.

social_media.headline: Pride Month. More Is More. Always.
lines: POV: it's Pride Month and your rainbow sequin co-ord is the most honest thing you've ever worn.
Pride fit check — every color, every silhouette, every identity. Dress as the fullest version of yourself. Happy Pride. 🌈

events.title: Masters of the Universe
events.genres: Action, Fantasy, Superhero, Science Fiction, Sword and Sorcery
events.description: Prince Adam returns to a shattered Eternia after 15 years — the Sword of Power calls him home to face Skeletor's fiendish rule, reunite with Teela and Man-At-Arms, and embrace his ultimate destiny as He-Man, the most powerful man in the universe.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Masters of the Universe is a major fantasy action film with a deeply nostalgic and maximalist visual identity — genZScore 7-9. The He-Man universe is one of the most visually bold and color-saturated fantasy worlds — the screening crowd spans nostalgic millennials who grew up with the original cartoon and GenZ fans discovering it fresh. The character aesthetics are uniquely catalog-rich: (1) He-Man/Prince Adam — the most physically powerful character in the universe, his aesthetic is bold primary colors — sky blue, gold, and the iconic cross harness. Translated to fashion: structured pieces in royal blue, gold accents, powerful silhouettes; (2) Skeletor — the most camp and fashion-forward villain in fantasy history, his purple and black aesthetic with bone motifs is genuinely editorial; (3) Teela — warrior-woman energy, red and gold, powerful and athletic; (4) She-Ra adjacent — pink, gold, and ethereal feminine power. The overall color palette is maximally bold — royal blue, deep purple, gold, red, black, and silver. June in Bengaluru is peak monsoon — indoor screening, breathable fabrics essential. The sword-and-sorcery genre opens fantasy-inspired fashion references — statement accessories, bold color-blocking, and the kind of maximalist dressing that matches Eternia's visual scale.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Masters of the Universe screening is the most maximally bold and color-saturated fashion moment of June — Eternia's visual language gives direct catalog direction. Four character-inspired directions all work beautifully: He-Man direction — royal blue and gold color-blocking is the most powerful catalog call. A royal blue co-ord with gold accessories, or a structured navy suit with bold gold chain jewellery channels Prince Adam's destiny energy. Women in a royal blue satin co-ord or a bold color-blocked blue and gold dress — by the power of Greyskull, this is the fit. Skeletor direction — the most fashion-forward option for those who root for the villain. Deep purple and black with silver accessories — a purple co-ord or a black set with purple accents is genuinely editorial and very Skeletor-coded. A structured black blazer with deep purple trousers and silver chain jewellery is the most sophisticated Masters of the Universe screening look. Teela direction — red and gold warrior energy, athletic but powerful. She-Ra direction — pink, gold, and ethereal for those who want the princess of power aesthetic. Bold statement jewellery is non-negotiable — chunky chains, large hoops, stacked rings in gold or silver. Caps in bold colors. The June monsoon means breathable fabrics in bold colors — polyester and cotton blends hold saturated colors beautifully in humidity.

app.headline: By The Power Of Greyskull, Dress Up.
lines: Royal blue and gold or deep purple and black — He-Man vs Skeletor, your call.
Eternia's most powerful characters have the most catalog-matchable color palettes.
The most powerful man in the universe deserves the most powerful outfit in the room.

social_media.headline: He-Man Blue Or Skeletor Purple. Pick A Side.
lines: Masters of the Universe screening dress code — royal blue and gold if you're a hero, deep purple and black if you're not. Both look incredible.
I Have The Power — and apparently also this royal blue co-ord with gold chains. Masters of the Universe, June 5th. ⚔️👑
